title: chloropyron canescens
intro: Chloropyron canescens, also known as Mission manzanita or grayleaf manzanita, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rhamnaceae. This shrub has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its astringent and anti-inflammatory properties, which can help to soothe wounds, reduce pain, and combat infection. The plant's health benefits are attributed to its ability to boost the immune system, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antimicrobial properties. Chloropyron canescens can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or salve, allowing for various herbal preparations to be used for its medicinal and health benefits.
